title: Hitchhiker talking about aliens he has met

transcript.text: Alright, it's recording. Just put it in your face so you can see yourself talk and tell me the story.
So I was in Garberville in Humboldt County and I met this guy named Matty.
You met Matty?
Yeah, and he reminded me of this cartoon character that I drew.
He's a pimp in a wheelchair. He wears alligator boots.
But this guy was wearing alligator boots.
And like, I can barely talk like him, but I'll try.
He was like, oh man, you don't know what to talk about mine.
And like, you barely understand him.
And he would laugh like, he'd be like, oh ho ho ho.
And like snorting and stuff.
Yeah, and he had these alligator boots that were like, he was like clicking and clacking them.
Like, we're sitting down and he's like, he's like clacking them on the floor.
Like, and uh, so now I have my character set in stone pretty much like how he's going to be.
Like a...
Do you think he's an alien?
Because he was, he was just way too...
And he said he was from L.A.
Which is like, an alien could easily learn about L.A.
Yeah.
And, but he sounded like he was from Louisiana.
Uh-huh.
You know?
Like special wisdom that only an alien would know?
Very like, he would just agree with everything he said.
Not to make you question him, you know?
Uh-huh.
But some of his ways were just very...
Weird.
Alien-like.
I know this guy named Doc in San Diego.
Yeah.
He's kind of similar to this guy, Matty.
Yeah.
But Doc is like, sometimes dresses in drag.
Yeah.
But it's not quite like, dressing like a woman.
But just like, really interesting clothes.
Like, he had this silk, this silk jacket with like a big dragon on it.
Yeah.
And he's like, guess what?
I got this jacket at the mall yesterday.
I seen this man wearing it.
And I said, how much for that jacket?
Uh-huh.
They're like, that's...
And he said he paid $5,000 for it.
He's a reverend.
Yeah.
